metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4982
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 1d: STED super-resolution microscopy of double immunofluorescence labeling for LOTUS (CRTAC1) and PSD-95 (DLG4) in cultured hippocampal mouse neurons showed partial co-localization at the postsynaptic density. Using the same techniques, Bassoon (BSN, a presynaptic active zone protein) showed proximate localization to LOTUS but a lower rate of co-localization (than LOTUS with PSD-95).. Experimental description: M&M:
"C57BL/6 J mice were purchased from Charles River Co. (Japan, Inc.), and the lotus/crtac1b gene knockout mice (Acc. No. CDB0599K"

"Cell culture of hippocampal neurons The hippocampal nerve cell primary culture method was partially modified from the original protocol35. The hippocampus was excised from embryos (E17.5) of WT and LOTUS-KO mice."

checks.label: OWL Consistency
checks.error_message: No inferences attributed to this model graph in the materializer output. Likely a parse failure or other materializer skip — re-run on this model alone to investigate.
